[Home](./index.md) &gt; [@empathyco/x-components](./x-components.md) &gt; [BannersList](./x-components.bannerslist.md)

## BannersList class

It renders a [ItemsList](./x-components.itemslist.md) list of banners from [SearchState.banners](./x-components.searchstate.banners.md) by default using the `ItemsInjectionMixin`<!-- -->.

The component provides a default slot which wraps the whole component with the `banners` plus the `searchInjectedItems` which also contains the injected list items from the ancestor.

It also provides the parent slots to customize the items.

<b>Signature:</b>

```typescript
export default class BannersList extends ItemsListInjectionMixin 
```
<b>Extends:</b> [ItemsListInjectionMixin](./x-components.itemslistinjectionmixin.md)

## Properties

|  Property | Modifiers | Type | Description |
|  --- | --- | --- | --- |
|  [animation](./x-components.bannerslist.animation.md) |  | Vue \| string | Animation component that will be used to animate the banners. |
|  [stateItems](./x-components.bannerslist.stateitems.md) |  | Banner\[\] | The banners to render from the state. |
